education.degree: Master of Science in Financial Economics
education.focus: Advanced quantitative finance, econometrics, dynamic programming, statistical analysis, and causal inference.

education.note: Degree completion one year ahead of schedule (Bac+4)
education.specialization: Financial analysis and valuation. Completed University Program in Value Investing and AFI Business School's Valuation Analysis program.

education.institution: IU International University of Applied Sciences
relevant_coursework: Calculus and Linear Algebra for Data Science
Probability Theory with Applications in Stochastic Modeling
Comprehensive Database Management and Optimization Techniques
Foundations of Machine Learning and Algorithmic Design
Predictive Analytics and High-Dimensional Data Visualization

work_experience.description: Performed full-scope fund accounting for Private Equity and Real Estate funds (NAV, CAS, financial statements, investor reporting). Oversaw capital flows, waterfall allocations, and consolidation across real estate structures. Analyzed cap rates and fair value movements for valuations. Supported interest rate swap accounting and designed automated reporting tools.

Involved in syndicated loan restructuring (amendments, refinancing, debt-to-equity conversions). Analyzed credit facilities, drawdowns, and compliance. Assisted with forward contracts and hedging structures for interest rate and FX risk. Prepared statutory financial statements and CAS reports.
Portfolio analysis, KYC for physical persons, risk profile analysis, AML, and bank account management.
Financial valuation and analysis in acquisition research. Comparable company analysis and market assessment.
Portfolio Management of personal investments in stocks and funds using financial models and comparables.
